title: Chapter 96
content:
It was useless to ask the question in the final chapter. While writing last night, a new scenario came to mind, and I couldn't help but begin to explore it. So, the foursome would end here, in this chapter. Not the only reason as well, because it's been a while since the third volume started, and I haven't addressed much of the plot yet, so I'd like to focus on that as well. But ultimately, it's a lemon novel, so be sure that lemons will rain.

Enjoy~~

~~

Chapter 96

“Huh? Did someone scream?” Lucas asked as he suddenly opened his eyes. There was nothing after the scream he thought he heard while training.

Assuming that his ears were ringing, he resumed his activities.

‘But I do wonder where he got it from.’ Gazing at the book he held, Lucas pondered. The swordsmanship technique was quite intricate for something that was held in the hands of the individual. Due to his status, Lucas had not encountered many, but the low-level ones he had encountered were completely different from this one.

From the start, it was just physical activities. In order to get the most out of swordsmanship, you had to change the way your body is built before the sword moves itself.

Unfortunately, Lucas was unable to determine its value due to the lack of rank; however, based on the details, it might have been more valuable than what his status could have earned.

‘I’d better ask him about it later.’ After giving it some thought, Lucas resumed training, and for the remainder of the session, he did not hear any more screams.

~~

“I can’t wait to do it again, Brother,” Martha said with a happy smile that made her look so innocent that it hurt my heart to know I was defiling someone so innocent.

But then I remembered how scary that innocent person could be, and all the guilt went away. In its place were alarm bells telling me I should worry more about myself than about her.

“I wanted to do it again, but I’m willing to wait,” Sandra said, her voice showing a hint of disappointment, but she wasn't being unreasonable.

“Now, now. Your brother needs rest.” Rayla came to my defense. She was a mother after all.

“I’m not complaining, Mother.” Sandra replied, then said, “It just feels so good. Not to mention, I feel something different every time we have…”

She didn't say anything for a moment before she looked at me and asked, "What did you call it, Brother? The communion of your penis and vagina?”

“It’s dick and pussy, Sister.” Just then, Martha said, as if she were scolding Sandra for using the wrong words.

“Right. Dick and pussy. I remember you using a proper term for it.” Sandra corrected herself and then asked.

“It’s called ‘Sex’,” I replied with a smile.

“Right. Sex. It feels very good for some reason.” Rayla said with a deep sigh.

“And beneficial too.” Sandra chimed in, to which everyone nodded.

“…”

After a while of silence, I asked, "But you remember what we promised, right?"

“That we are to never tell anyone about this?” Rayla asked.

“Yes,” I replied.

“Come to think of it, if you can tell all of us, then why not Father and Lucas?” Sandra asked.

Because I’m worried they’ll ask me to do the same.

Ugh. Just thinking about it is giving me chills.

“It’s alright. We won’t tell anyone. But the fact that you told Sister Sandra before me does bug me a little." Martha's earlier part of the sentence was delivered with the utmost resolve, while her later part featured a cute pouty face.

“He had no choice. He didn’t know how we would react.” Sandra replied.

“But not a word of this to anyone, girls.” Rayla sternly said, and they both nodded. At last, I sighed and glanced at the blinking notifications in front of me. The most pressing ones, the pregnancy-related ones, were taken care of when I was able to breathe again in the room earlier, but I didn't read anything else.

Especially the part I was most curious about.

I didn’t wait any longer and checked while the women were all in the bath pool, talking to each other.

[Pregnancy of Martha ??? will be nullified]

[The blessing of Eileithyia would be directed toward Martha ???]

[A random effect would take place]

[…]

[…]

[Eileithyia’s childbirth blessing would take place]

[From now on, for each nullified pregnancy, Martha ??? would obtain five random physical stat points]

[In case of Pregnancy is not nullified]

[Martha ???’s child would gain a special effect which would be shared with the mother upon childbirth]

‘…’

That’s…

Damn, I was at a loss for words. So now, every time Martha and I had sex, she would get a lot of aura and some random physical stat points. That would accelerate her growth rate by a lot.

Anyway, with this, I was aware of one thing.

The new effect wouldn't work on all women, and it wouldn't always work.

This needed more research.

Luckily, the research materials were right before me.
